description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build v8 that runs on a workflow dispatch. The workflow builds V8 for multiple platforms including Android arm64-v8a, armeabi-v7a, and x86_64, Windows 64-bit and 32-bit with different configurations, and macOS and iOS with different configurations. For each job, check out the repository, run a build script specific to the platform with version 8.4.371.19, and upload the resulting binaries as artifacts.
